Motion For Approval Of Joint Stipulation And [Proposed] Order Re Dismissal Per Cal. Rule Of Court 3.770(C)
Off Calendar Jul-08-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF DAVE ALONZO's Motion For Approval Of Joint Stipulation And [Proposed] Order Re Dismissal Per Cal. Rule Of Court 3.770(C)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for approval of joint stipulation and [proposed] order re dismissal per Cal. Rule of Court 3.770(c)" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/RBU)
